_comment: Run scaffolding deck for the exploratory product-journey pilot.

scenes.title: Product Journey Eval
scenes.subtitle: Skeptical user path across site/docs/onboarding + three validated project oracles
scenes.narration: Pilot implementation landed in a worktree under .worktrees so the branch stays isolated and reviewable.

scenes.title: Pilot state
scenes.narration: The first milestone is runnable from a local checkout: one entrypoint, explicit project catalog, and validated local oracles for all three project lanes.

cards.label: Corpus
cards.sub: gears-rust (4 armable fixtures) via existing external grader, cached after a passing verify

cards.label: Local checks
cards.sub: status/check commands are deterministic and no-LLM by default

cards.label: Perspectives
cards.sub: postgresql and kubernetes cloned under ~/code and validated with deterministic local oracle scripts

scenes.body: `python3 tools/product-journey/run.py --project <project> --mode check` now reports validated for all three lanes: gears-rust is cached after a passing external-benchmark verify, PostgreSQL runs the ALTER DOMAIN VALIDATE CONSTRAINT oracle, and Kubernetes runs the nil-Memory guard oracle.
scenes.narration: The check surface is the minimum viable control for orchestrator automation: deterministic readiness before any model-driven runs.

scenes.title: Latest check state

cells: set GEARS_RUST_RECHECK=1 and run: GEARS_RUST_REPO=<path> make gears-bakeoff

scenes.caption: Each perspective now has a concrete local oracle and a repeatable validation command.

scenes.title: Local execution artifacts
scenes.caption: Deck is source-of-truth JSON in docs; rendered HTML stays in .artifacts/.

scenes.body: With this baseline stable, stage the local production bundle with `make web` and serve it via `go run ./cmd/kitsoki web --addr 127.0.0.1:7777` for A/B experiments, then rerun any lane explicitly when you want fresh evidence (`GEARS_RUST_RECHECK=1` for the heavy external benchmark).
scenes.narration: Evidence-first approach: every check emits to `.context` and every lane has a repeatable local command.

scenes.body: Ran the harness path locally: `python3 tools/product-journey/run.py --project gears-rust --mode check` now returns a cached validation result, while the PostgreSQL and Kubernetes project checks run local oracle scripts that prove red@baseline and green@fix. The companion `tools/story-qa/run.py --project all` summary now reports all three lanes as validated, and writes the transient report under `.context/`.
scenes.narration: The deck now reflects the actual runtime state: cached heavy benchmark plus two repeatable local oracles, all visible in the report surface.
